articles.title: A dress made of 500 bread loaves? This reality star’s viral red carpet outfit sparks a food wastage debate on the internet
articles.description: Television star Queen Mercy Atang’s bread dress at the AMVCA Awards 2026 sparks a fashion debate online, revolving around food wastage, creativity, and whether it is fashionably wrong.

articles.title: Alia turns heads with jaw-dropping red carpet look at Cannes
articles.description: After much anticipation, Alia Bhatt finally made her first appearance at the Cannes Film Festival, and her red carpet look instantly grabbed everyone’s attention. Representing L'Oreal Paris at the opening ceremony on May 12, Alia stunned in a custom peach couture gown by Tamara Ralph, styled by Rhea Kapoor.

articles.title: FIR against seven in Mumbai for claiming to cure illnesses through miracles
articles.description: Mumbai’s Malad Police filed an FIR against seven for allegedly claiming to cure illnesses through miracles, invoking Maharashtra’s 2013 anti-black magic law.

articles.title: Lollapalooza 2026 daily schedule released — Set times, artists, tickets, and what fans need to know about the Chicago Music Festival
articles.description: Lollapalooza 2026 has released its full daily schedule, confirming performances from over 150 artists across four days in Chicago’s Grant Park from July 30 to August 2. Major headliners include Charli XCX, Lorde, The Smashing Pumpkins, JENNIE, Tate McRae, and The XX. The schedule helps fans plan across eight stages featuring pop, indie, and electronic acts. High demand has pushed all four-day tickets to waitlists, with limited one-day passes remaining.

articles.title: 7 Sunny Leone's Entertaining Films To Watch On Her Birthday
articles.description: Sunny Leone is celebrating her 45th birthday on May 13. Have a look at these 7 entertaining films that you can watch on her birthday.

articles.title: 7 K-Dramas To Watch With Family On OTT - Reply 1988 To Goblin
articles.description: From heartwarming nostalgia in Reply 1988 to magical romance in Goblin, this list of 7 K-Dramas offers laughter, love, and family bonds, perfect for cosy binge-watching with your family on any OTT platform!

articles.title: Katy Perry Toasts Josh Groban's Engagement With Hilarious Video
articles.description: Holding an orange-coloured drink, Katy Perry slowly raises a toast to the camera, takes a sip and then intentionally spills the drink all over herself in the video.

articles.title: Alia Bhatt’s Tamara Ralph Couture Had Cannes 2026 Talking, but the Dupatta Won South Asia’s Heart
articles.description: At the Cannes opening ceremony, the actor paired sculpted coral couture with a flowing scarf, giving the global red carpet a distinctly South Asian moment.

articles.title: Heer Sara Aur Pondicherry Trailer Out: Patralekhaa And Maanvi Gagroo Hit The Road To Escape Society
articles.description: Heer Sara Aur Pondicherry stars Patralekhaa and Maanvi Gagroo in a heartfelt slice-of-life drama. The trailer reveals how the girls liberate themselves from constant pressure from society and head on to a soulful journey to Pondicherry.

articles.title: Taylor Swift Reunites With Family In NYC Amid Wedding Rumours With Travis Kelce
articles.description: Taylor Swift was recently spotted arriving at a restaurant in New York City alongside her family, amid her growing wedding rumours.

articles.title: Meghan Markle shares sweet glimpse of Archie and Lilibet’s Disneyland Trip; See post
articles.description: Meghan Markle gave fans a rare peek into Prince Archie and Princess Lilibet’s Disneyland outing with Prince Harry and Doria Ragland, including a heartwarming Cinderella moment.

articles.title: Mouni Roy-Suraj Nambiar divorce speculation intensifies as husband deactivates social media account
articles.description: Rumours of trouble in Mouni Roy and Suraj Nambiar’s marriage grew stronger after Suraj reportedly deactivated his social media account following unfollows and the removal of wedding photos.

articles.title: Chitrangada Singh says she was once considered for a film directed by Aditya Dhar: ‘It was almost getting done’
articles.description: Following the success of Dhurandhar: The Revenge, Chitrangada Singh praised the work of Aditya Dhar and revealed that she had almost worked with him earlier.

articles.title: CPM: Prolonged uncertainty over CM selection unfair to all who voted for Congress
articles.description: T'puram: The Left Democratic Front (LDF) on Tuesday accused the Congress of failing to honour the mandate given by the people by delaying the selectio.

articles.title: Salman Khan's Raj-DK Film: Kareena Kapoor NOT Approached Yet, Casting To Begin Soon - Report
articles.description: Reports claiming that Kareena Kapoor Khan will star opposite Salman Khan in Raj Nidimoru and Krishna DK's upcoming film are reportedly false. Sources say that Bebo has not been approached yet.

articles.title: Quote of the day by ‘Money Heist’ star Álvaro Morte: ‘In this world, everything is governed by a simple balance’
articles.description: In a recent interview, Spanish actor Álvaro Morte, best known for his iconic role as The Professor in Netflix's 'Money Heist,' shared an insightful thought: "Everything in life operates on a fundamental balance." This philosophy resonates deeply with the themes of the series, reflecting the delicate dance of wins and losses that characterize our existence.

articles.title: Inside Tranzit, Khan Market's New Buzzing Restaurant And Cocktail Bar
articles.description: Looking for a new place in Khan Market? Tranzit is drawing attention for its cocktails and vibe. Here is a closer look at the food, drinks, and overall experience.

articles.title: Mithun Chakraborty to join Sanjay Dutt's Aakhri Sawal grand promotion event in Kolkata
articles.description: Veteran actor Mithun Chakraborty will be joining the promotional campaign of the upcoming film Aakhri Sawal in Kolkata. His presence at the grand press conference has further amplified excitement around the film ahead of its 2026 release.

articles.title: Moushumi Chatterjee says she got married at 15 to fulfill dying aunt's wish: ‘Everyone wanted me...’
articles.description: Moushumi Chatterjee married producer Jayanta Mukherjee at the age of 15 after she made her debut in Balika Badhu in 1967.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by Sir Walter Scott: 'Love will subsist on wonderfully little..'—Top quotes by the famous novelist known for the Waverley novels and Ivanhoe
articles.description: Quote of the Day: Sir Walter Scott, a celebrated author, penned a timeless quote about love and hope. His words suggest love can survive on minimal hope but not without it entirely. This insight into emotional endurance remains relevant today. Scott's life and literary contributions, including inventing the historical novel, are explored. His legacy continues to inspire.

articles.title: Michael becomes second highest-grossing biopic ever as it collects 577 million dollars, beats Elvis at global box office
articles.description: Michael, based on the life of Michael Jackson, has become the second highest-grossing biopic of all time globally, surpassing Elvis. The film has also crossed Rs. 63 crore gross in India.

articles.title: Was Donald Trump's golden statue vandalized? Truth behind viral post
Bollywood celebrities who unfollowed each other on Instagram
articles.description: In the Bollywood realm, it’s all about close ones and social media snarks. After the scripts, the box-office collection, and the dance-off, all the buzz comes down to that particular blue ‘Follow’ button on Instagram. While the truest of friendships are witnessed within the industry, the tables can quickly turn by just one unfollow. Before the headlines take over the internet, there are fans speculating in the comment section about the cause and the aftermath. Here’s a look at the moments that churned the internet, where Bollywood celebrities unfollowed each other.

articles.title: High Court Gives Verdict On Lawrence Of Punjab: Will The Zee5 Series Release Or Not?
articles.description: The Punjab and Haryana High Court has announced its verdict on the release of Zee5 documentary series Lawrence Of Punjab. The series had been blocked by the government following concerns that it glorified crime.

articles.title: Esha gets emotional remembering Dharmendra; Bobby shows support
articles.description: Esha Deol has launched her own interior design label, getting emotional as she remembered her late father Dharmendra, whose words and encouragement inspired her to take this step. Her brother Bobby Deol showed his support by reposting her video. Dharmendra passed away in November 2025 at the age of 89.

articles.title: This Actress Played Shah Rukh Khan’s Mother Figure Despite Being 19 Years Younger, Called It ‘Ridiculous’
articles.description: Ridhi Dogra once opened up about playing a mother figure to Shah Rukh Khan in Jawan and said that it was ‘the stuff nightmares are made of.’

articles.title: ‘Peddi’ trailer: Ram Charan and Janhvi Kapoor starrer's grand trailer launch shifted from Bhopal to Mumbai
articles.description: Ram Charan's highly anticipated film 'Peddi' will unveil its trailer in Mumbai this week. While the trailer launch shifts to the city, makers are planning a grand musical event in Bhopal for a special song. Director Buchi Babu Sana expressed excitement for a massive Bhopal celebration, aiming to connect with audiences nationwide from the heart of India.

articles.title: Shekhar Suman returns with new talk show 'Shekhar Tonite' after 14 years
articles.description: Shekhar Suman is back with a new talk show, 'Shekhar Tonite', after nearly 14 years. Created by his son Adhyayan Suman, the show promises unscripted conversations focusing on human moments and will premiere on his YouTube channel from May 15.

articles.title: 'Raja Shivaji' BO day 12 [LIVE]: Total India net crosses Rs. 70.86 crore, Rs. 75 crore landmark within sight
articles.description: Riteish Deshmukh's magnum opus 'Raja Shivaji' continues to rewrite the record books for Marathi cinema and the momentum shows no signs of stalling. Re.

articles.title: Abhishek Bachchan shuts fee rumours on Raja Shivaji; calls Riteish Deshmukh’s film sacred project
articles.description: Abhishek Bachchan has opened up about joining Raja Shivaji without even reading the script, shutting down reports of hefty actor fees. Praising Riteish Deshmukh and Genelia Deshmukh, Abhishek called the film a “sacred” passion project and said it was never about money but an “emotional transaction,” with his heartfelt comments now winning praise across social media.

articles.title: Mouni Roy and Suraj Nambiar divorce rumours intensify after couple unfollow each other on Instagram
articles.description: Mouni Roy and Suraj Nambiar have sparked divorce rumors after reportedly unfollowing each other on social media. Fans noticed the change in their online activity, with reports also suggesting Suraj deleted wedding photos. The couple has not yet commented on the speculation surrounding their marriage.

articles.title: Desi Bling OTT Release Date Confirmed: When and Where to Watch it Online?
articles.description: Desi Bling is an upcoming reality series that revolves around the lives of elite indian expats in Dubai. Streaming soon, only on Netflix.

articles.description: Prime Video confirms return to Middle-earth in November 2026.

articles.title: International Nurses Day 2026: Date, theme, history, significance, and all you need to know
articles.description: International Nurses Day, celebrated on May 12, honours the dedication and service of nurses worldwide, marking the birth anniversary of Florence Nightingale. The day highlights their vital role in healthcare and promotes better support and working conditions for nursing professionals.

articles.title: Mira Nair unveils Amri, a movie inspired by Amrita Sher-Gil’s life and legacy
articles.description: Anjali Sivaraman leads the cast as the iconic artist, alongside Emily Watson, Jaideep Ahlawat, Anjana Vasan, Jim Sarbh and Priyanka Chopra Jonas.

articles.title: Who is Suraj Nambiar? Know all about Mouni Roy's businessman husband amid their divorce rumours
articles.description: Mouni Roy and husband Suraj Nambiar are making headlines after divorce rumours surfaced online. Here’s everything to know about Suraj, his business background, and the speculation surrounding the couple.

articles.title: HR ignored his 3 issues for 6 months with 'we will look into it'. When asked the reason, his resignation answer stunned HR
articles.description: An exit interview revealed months of ignored employee concerns, including low pay and lack of promotion, leading to a resignation. The employee highlighted a six-month wait for action, contrasting with a new employer's six-day decision. When HR offered to match the new salary, the employee questioned why he wasn't valued at that level previously.

articles.title: Viral Video: Tamannaah Bhatia Visits Mahakaleshwar Temple In Ujjain, Attends Bhasma Aarti
articles.description: Tamannaah Bhatia visited the temple dressed in a red saree

articles.description: Chardikala and September 21 became talking points for their storyline, powerful performances. These films will be showcased at Cannes.

articles.title: William H. Macy on Jim Carrey’s rumoured ‘tough’ behaviour on set
articles.description: Veteran actor William H. Macy recently shared his thoughts on difficult co-stars, expressing frustration with actors who make sets 'miserable' for others without consequence. While not directly naming names, Macy commented on rumors surrounding Jim Carrey's alleged tough on-set behavior, noting he's 'heard he can be really tough.' This echoes past criticism from Martin Freeman regarding Carrey's method acting.

articles.title: Savannah Guthrie breaking down between commercial breaks at ‘Today’ show amid search for Nancy, ‘She’s gotten emotional’
articles.description: Savannah Guthrie has been tearing up off-camera at the ‘Today’ show amid the search for her missing mother Nancy Guthrie.

articles.title: 'Oru Durooha Saahacharyathil' OTT release
articles.description: Kunchacko Boban's film 'Oru Durooha Saahacharyathil', directed by Ratheesh Balakrishnan Poduval, is now heading for digital streaming on May 13, 2026. Despite high expectations, the movie, set in Wayanad, did not achieve significant box office success. Critics noted a jarring tonal shift in the second half and a predictable climax, though the thematic foundation was strong.

articles.title: Love Horoscope Today, May 12, 2026
articles.description: Daily Love Horoscope for May 12 2026 highlights mixed romantic prospects for all zodiac signs, urging caution, optimism, patience, and awareness in relationships.

articles.title: 'Madhuvidhu' OTT release: When and where to stream Sharafudheen and Kalyani Panicker's romantic family drama
articles.description: Sharafudheen stars as Amruth Raj in 'Madhuvidhu,' a film about a newly married man and the ensuing chaos in his traditional household. Kalyani Panicker debuts as the female lead. The movie, exploring marital dreams and unexpected turns, begins streaming on Sony LIV on May 22. ETimes rated it 2.5/5, noting its descent into avoidable drama.

articles.title: American Idol voting number: How to vote by text for Hannah Harper, Jordan McCullough, and Keyla Richardson?
articles.description: Voting has begun for the American Idol Season 24 finale. Fans can vote for the finalists via text, the American Idol app, or the ABC website.

articles.title: Ranveer to play Lord Shiva in 'The Immortals of Meluha' adaptation
articles.description: Ranveer Singh is reportedly set to embody Lord Shiva in a grand cinematic trilogy based on Amish Tripathi's 'The Immortals of Meluha'. Singh's production banner has acquired the rights for this ambitious project, envisioned as a mythological universe. Screenplay and world-building are underway, with filming for the first installment slated for 2028, following Singh's current film commitments.

articles.title: 'Dhurandhar 2' box office collection day 54: Ranveer Singh’s film finally crosses the Rs 1795 cr mark amid OTT release buzz
articles.description: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar 2' is nearing its two-month box office run and is set for an OTT debut on May 14. The spy drama has achieved a worldwide gross collection of Rs 1,795.10 crore, with India's net collection reaching Rs 1,143.44 crore.
